message:
chore(ft-xbnl0.2.4): include tick 427 in check script (tick 427 follow-up)

Extend the cx-cancel check harness in scripts/check_ft_xbnl0_2_4.sh to
cover the Semaphore::acquire_owned_with_cx pre-cancel test added in
tick 427. Three small edits in the Run 6/6 block:

- Bump the test-count comment from "10" to "11" to reflect the new
  runtime_compat primitive-contract test.
- Extend the inline enumeration to mention the tick 427 test alongside
  the existing tick-421-through-426 entries.
- Broaden the cargo-test filter from `semaphore_acquire_with_cx` to
  the prefix `semaphore_acquire_`, which now catches both the borrow
  variant (tick 421, acquire_with_cx) and the owned variant (tick 427,
  acquire_owned_with_cx). Leaving the filter narrow would silently
  exclude the new owned-variant test.

Added inline note explaining why the filter was broadened so future
editors don't narrow it back during a refactor pass.

files.patch:
@@ -15,9 +15,9 @@
 #   4. Metrics server cx-first family (3) — metrics_server_start_with_cx_*
 #      Pre-cancel / mid-flight-cancel / happy path.
 #   5. Web server cx pre-cancel (1) — web_server_with_cx_*
-#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (10) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
+#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (11) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
 #      + yield_now_with_cx + oneshot_recv_with_cx + broadcast_recv_with_cx
-#      + semaphore_acquire_with_cx + mpsc_recv_with_cx + watch_changed_with_cx
+#      + semaphore_acquire_ + mpsc_recv_with_cx + watch_changed_with_cx
 #      + join_set_join_next_with_cx
 #      sleep_with_cx + timeout_with_cx budget-observation tests (ticks
 #      382/383), yield_now_with_cx cancel-checkpoint + happy-path tests
@@ -26,7 +26,10 @@
 #      Semaphore::acquire_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 421),
 #      mpsc::Receiver::recv pre-cancel test (tick 422),
 #      watch::Receiver::changed pre-cancel test (tick 423),
-#      JoinSet::join_next_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 426).
+#      JoinSet::join_next_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 426),
+#      Semaphore::acquire_owned_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 427).
+#      The semaphore filter is `semaphore_acquire_` so it catches both
+#      borrow and owned variants.
 #
 # Exit code 0 on all passing; non-zero on any failure.
 #
@@ -130,7 +133,7 @@ run_test "Run 6/6: runtime_compat primitive contracts (budget + cancel observati
     -p frankenterm-core \
     --features asupersync-runtime \
     --lib \
-    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_with_cx mpsc_recv_with_cx watch_changed_with_cx join_set_join_next_with_cx
+    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_ mpsc_recv_with_cx watch_changed_with_cx join_set_join_next_with_cx
 
 echo
 echo "=============================================================="
